profile.name: plasmic

intro.title: <!-- AUTO-GENERATED-CONTENT:START (STARTER) -->
intro.desc: The open-source visual builder for your codebase. Build beautiful apps and websites incredibly fast. Drag and drop your own components, integrate with your codebase. Break through the low-code ceiling.

features: Applications: let developers and technical users quickly build internal tools, client portals, and business software
Website builder and design tool that doesn’t limit you to some built-in ecommerce platform, CMS, or hosting
